summary: Iteration 356 — Verified end-to-end: (1) QR target_url now starts with https://konekt.co.tz/ for both ?ref=PARTNER10 and no-ref cases — preview-emergent domain no longer leaks. PNG 200 image/png served. JSON sibling of /api/qr/product/.png?ref=PARTNER10 returns target_url='https://konekt.co.tz/shop/product/?ref=PARTNER10'. (2) Affiliate.test@konekt.co.tz: my-status returns affiliate_code='PARTNER10' AND affiliate_code_locked=true; POST /api/affiliate-program/setup/promo-code with a different code returns 409 with 'lock' in message and code remains PARTNER10. (3) Affiliate stats are zeroed (total_earnings=pending=paid=earnings_this_month=0). (4) New AffiliateOnboardingModal mounts on /partner/affiliate-dashboard first paint with data-testid='affiliate-onboarding-modal'; header 'AFFILIATE ONBOARDING · STEP 1 OF 3' (uppercase); background gradient is deep navy linear-gradient(to right bottom, rgb(32,54,77), rgb(35,65,95), rgb(26,45,64)) — i.e. #20364D — NOT purple/violet/indigo; PARTNER10 visible in gold pill; footer buttons: 'Skip tour', 'Open Content Studio', 'Next'. (5) Modal navigation: Next→Step 2 'Every closed order credits you'; Next→Step 3 'Cash out from your dashboard' with 'Got it' finish button. Clicking Got it persists localStorage konekt_affiliate_onboarding_v2_dismissed='1' and modal does not reappear after reload. (6) KPI cards on affiliate dashboard read TZS 0 across Earnings This Month / Total / Pending / Paid; Wallet Available/Pending/Paid Out all TZS 0. (7) Affiliate Content Studio drawer QR src has '?ref=PARTNER10' and JSON sibling target_url starts with https://konekt.co.tz/. (8) /admin/content-studio drawer is clean — NO PARTNER10, NO 'SCAN TO ORDER', NO QR overlay (footer reads 'ORDER NOW' only). Group Deals are surfaced (Deals (6) tab present in admin Content Studio; affiliate dashboard 'GROUP DEALS' section renders Wrist Bands etc).
critical_code_review_comments: qr_code_routes._frontend_base() correctly hard-defaults to https://konekt.co.tz and intentionally ignores FRONTEND_URL — verified via target_url JSON. Priority chain PRODUCTION_DOMAIN > CANONICAL_FRONTEND_URL > konekt.co.tz hard-default is sound and resilient to env drift.

AffiliateOnboardingModal renders with the correct Konekt navy gradient (#20364D family) and gold accent (#D4A843) — verified via computed style. Three-step flow (Share / Customers buy / Get paid) progresses with Next, persists dismissal via localStorage, and does not reappear on reload. Header uses uppercase 'AFFILIATE ONBOARDING · STEP n OF 3' as required.

Affiliate stats wipe is reflected in /api/affiliate-program/my-status response — every numeric field returned is 0 for affiliate.test@konekt.co.tz; UI KPI cards render TZS 0 consistently. Wallet card also fully zeroed.

Promo-code lock contract is solid: /my-status returns affiliate_code_locked=true and POST /setup/promo-code returns 409 with 'locked' message; persisted code remains PARTNER10 after the failed POST (re-fetched after rejection — confirmed unchanged).

Admin /admin/content-studio renders zero affiliate artefacts — no PARTNER10, no 'SCAN TO ORDER' text anywhere on grid or drawer, and zero . AdminContentStudioPage correctly omits viewerPromoCode so FooterBar collapses to ORDER NOW.

Note: /admin/content-studio shows an Ops-Onboarding modal on first visit that intercepts pointer events on grid items — not regression for this iteration but worth flagging: pre-dismissed via localStorage in tests.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 7 acceptance criteria — QR target=konekt, onboarding modal mount/colors/copy/buttons/navigation/persistence, KPIs zeroed, affiliate Content Studio QR resolves to konekt.co.tz, admin Content Studio clean — verified via Playwright)

test_credentials.affiliate: affiliate.test@konekt.co.tz / Affiliate#Konekt2026 (works, PARTNER10 locked, all stats zeroed)

seed_data_creation: QR PNG cache files generated by /api/qr/product/iter356-test* and iter356-decode* during pytest. No DB writes by tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-356 acceptance criteria are GREEN. Backend regression suite: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_qr_brand_lock_v356.py (covers QR konekt domain + image PNG + cache decode + promo lock 409 + zero stats). Frontend manual / playwright: (a) login as affiliate.test, run localStorage.removeItem('konekt_affiliate_onboarding_v2_dismissed'), navigate to /partner/affiliate-dashboard → modal appears; (b) cycle Next→Next→Got it and verify localStorage flag set to '1'; (c) reload — modal does not reappear; (d) navigate to /partner/affiliate-content-studio, click any [data-testid^='studio-item-'], assert img[alt='QR'].src contains '?ref=PARTNER10' and JSON sibling target_url starts with https://konekt.co.tz/. Admin /admin/content-studio drawer should remain clean — no PARTNER10/QR. Pre-dismiss ops-onboarding-modal via localStorage to avoid pointer-event interception during tests.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — feature pack working as specified; previous iteration-355 fixes for QR/lock retained; this iteration adds (a) konekt.co.tz hard-default in qr_code_routes._frontend_base (FRONTEND_URL ignored), (b) AffiliateOnboardingModal with Konekt navy + gold theme replacing AffiliateWelcomeCards, (c) DB wipe of affiliate.test stats — all three changes verified.
